strengths: Full-stack TypeScript and Node.js expertise with demonstrated shipping across multiple companies
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, CI/CD, clean code practices documented in multiple roles
Recent relevant tech exposure: currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq with TypeScript/Node.js; React experience at Optilyz (2021–2025)
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff Engineer applying for entry-level role signals misaligned career expectations and high attrition risk
Relational database production gap: Recent work emphasizes MongoDB; minimal evidence of PostgreSQL or relational database expertise despite role requirement
Nest.js missing from documented skill set despite being core requirement; React experience limited to one employer (Optilyz) with no depth evidence
response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for an entry-level position, creating acute retention and satisfaction risk. While demonstrating strong TypeScript/Node.js and recent React exposure, critical technical gaps emerge: relational database production experience (role requires PostgreSQL; resume emphasizes MongoDB), and no Nest.js expertise despite it being a core requirement. The Staff Engineer to junior-level trajectory is fundamentally misaligned and raises questions about motivation, work sustainability, and role fit. This position would significantly underutilize the candidate's capabilities and competencies.
